features.name: shiftx undersized A input
features.description: Code should include a $shiftx cell instantiation where A_WIDTH is less than 2 raised to B_WIDTH (A_WIDTH < 2**B_WIDTH), meaning the data input is smaller than the addressable range of the shift amount

features.name: shiftx constant replication in A
features.description: Code should include a $shiftx cell where the A input is constructed by replicating a single value using concatenation operator, creating all-identical bits

features.name: shiftx with x/z in concatenated A input
features.description: Code should include a $shiftx cell where the A input concatenation contains don't-care values (1'bx or 1'bz) mixed with other signals

features.name: inferred shiftx via dynamic array indexing
features.description: Code should include dynamic array indexing where a wire is indexed by a shift amount variable, inferring a $shiftx-like operation
